arts.ttl: How to watch Brentford vs Wolves
arts.sum: Brentford vs Wolves kicks off at 3pm with the Matchday Live stream beginning around 30 minutes ahead of kick-off at 2.30pm. Live text coverage of Brentford vs Wolves is also being provided on Saturday afternoon as wolves.co.uk returns with the Matchday Blog, beginning two hours ahead of kick-off.

arts.ttl: Brentford vs Wolves: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Two clubs ravaged by injury crises meet on Saturday when Brentford host Wolverhampton Wanderers in the Premier League at the Gtech Community Stadium. It's been a wretched start to the season for Wolves and Gary O'Neil has not been aided in his attempts to get points on the board by the amount of injuries currently hampering his squad.

arts.ttl: Brentford boss Thomas Frank provides Christian Norgaard injury ahead ahead of Wolves clash
arts.sum: Brentford head coach Thomas Frank provides an injury update on Christian Norgaard ahead of Saturday's Premier League home meeting with Wolverhampton Wanderers.
